calendar.matters:
Petition For Cash Distribution From The Estate Of Amy Wong Kao
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for (administrator) Bertha Joung. David Yang for the petitioner of the estate of William Lin.

The Court asked if there was anything further to report. Ms. Ng stated that she has tried to get the parties together, that there is no cooperation and that her client does not have the authority for non pro-rata distribution. Mr. Yang stated that the estate of Lin is one of the two beneficiaries, that it is entitled to 50%, that there is cash in the amount of $148,240.00 (or $146,240.00), that there is an issue with one of the beneficiaries being a judgment debtor, that it is appropriate to allow the cash portion to be distributed to the estate of Lin which will eliminate the need to go after Camelia Kao and that complaints have been made but there is no legal basis. Ms. Ng stated that on 10/7/15 she filed a letter from Camelia Kao with her response, that there is a long history in the conservatorship of letters being sent creating unnecessary expenses, that they do not see the legal authority to order something like this, that there is a history of Ms. Kao signing her mothers name on annuities and thinking that she should get everything and that this has gone to litigation. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order). The petition for cash distribution from the estate of Amy Wong Kao was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Continued To Sep-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for (administrator) Bertha Joung.

The Court and Ms. Ng agreed that they had expected the appearance of Mr. Lin and Ms. Kao. Ms. Ng realized that the amended notice of hearing showed a hearing date of September 9, 2015. The accounting petition was continued to September 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 as was stated on the notice.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
